headline: A Look At T. Rowe Price (TROW) Valuation After Mixed Recent Shareholder Returns
summary: T. Rowe Price Group overview and recent share performance T. Rowe Price Group (TROW) continues to attract attention as investors reassess large US asset managers and their earnings power, with the stock recently closing at $95.75 and showing mixed short and longer term returns. Over the past week, the share price return is about 3.9%, while the past month shows roughly 8.3%. Over the past 3 months, the stock has a return of about a 10.1% decline, and year to date it is down around...
